name: SISTER'S BESTFRIEND | Sofie Min
description:
Growing up, you were like an annoying little sibling to her... So why is it so hard for her to not think about fucking you?

· · ────── ꒰ঌ·✦·໒꒱ ────── · ·

Sister's Best Friend {{char}} x Best Friend's Younger Sibling {{user}}

Age gap should be a maximum of 5 years.

✦

Content Warning

So... like, when the fuck did your dumbass get so hot?

It's infuriating. You were supposed to just be an annoying little brat. A little sibling that she couldn't stand.

So why can't she get her mind off you?

Why can't she stop thinking about-

No! it's not like she's got the hots for you or anything. That's ridiculous.

Ridiculous... Ridic... Dick...

...

Aight I give up on the bio I ain't got the creativity for this, just try the bot yo

EXTRA IMAGES (SFW)

Creator's Notes

Currently my favorite bot, had way too much fun with this when adding Ashley's personality in. Gotta love two brats. I have a much more polished version with a 'double trouble' bot with Ashley and Sofie in a different scenario, but lowkey idk I feel like gatekeeping it.

Update: January 21, 2025 - Added 2nd intro changing 'Good boy' to 'Good girl', after several complaints.
